name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ How this bot works

• Submit products — tap 📦 Submit product, then send your product details.
• Check status — tap 📄 My submissions to see your recent listings.
• Review items — staff tap 📋 Review inbox to approve or reject products.

Tap /start to open the menu.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
